creator: miwi@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

it seem that the patch has been corrupted in the PR, I can only see a 
mess there. Could you please upload it somewhere or send it to me 
directly as a gzipped attachment? If you are sending PRs from the 
command line with send-pr, you can attach the patch with the -a option, 
this should work well. 

[16:31][miwi@miwi] $ patch < pr-patch 
(~/dev/ports/www/sams) Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...  The 
text leading up to this was: -------------------------- | | |Patch 
attached with submission follows: | |diff -ruN 
/usr/ports/www/sams/Makefile /tmp/sams-1.04/Makefile |--- 
/usr/ports/www/sams/Makefile       2008-11-14 04:36:58.000000000 +0400 
|+++ /tmp/sams-1.04/Makefile    2008-12-21 17:42:59.000000000 +0400 
-------------------------- Patching file Makefile using Plan A...  Hunk 
#1 failed at 6.  Hunk #2 succeeded at 22 (offset 1 line).  1 out of 2 
hunks failed--saving rejects to Makefile.rej Hmm...  The next patch 
looks like a unified diff to me...  The text leading up to this was: 
-------------------------- 

Thanks
